nasb.text: A chamber with its doorway was by the side pillars at the gates; there they rinse the burnt offering.

esv.text: There was a chamber with its door in the vestibule of the gate,  where the burnt offering was to be washed.

cnv.text: 在各門的牆柱旁邊都有一間有門的房子；那裡是洗燔祭牲的地方。

ccb.text: 门口的墙柱旁边有一个房间，供祭司洗燔祭牲。
